title: Nuclear Relativistics Reborn
body:
# Overview
A tech mod that reworks tomdodd4598's [NuclearCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nuclearcraft-mod). Use the nuclear materials to generate infinite energy!

# Features
**Note: The mod is currently at a very early stage and most features are not complete. You might not experience a complete mod content.**

The features remain almost the same as the original [NuclearCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nuclearcraft-mod). However, there are some changes:
- Fission fuels now vary in three different types (Default, Oxide, TRISO)
- Fission fuels now have a 16x generation rate compared to the original mod (Configurable), and the heat generation remains the same.

# Future Plans
- Complete the machine varieties
- Rework the multiblock system and implement reactors

# Issue Tracker
If you find any bugs or issues, please report them at: https://github.com/FnWD/NuclearRelativisticsReborn/issues

# License
The mod is distributed under the MIT License. You can use it in your modpack freely.
